weekly picks (Apr 1 week 2026)

Posted on April 6, 2026 in 2026apr,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Apr 1st week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score : 22543

2604.05311v1 Spin-biased quantum spin Hall effect in altermagnetic Lieb lattice (arXiv)

  • Score : 21406

2604.07074v1 Complete coherent control of spin qubits in self-assembled InAs quantum dots under oblique magnetic fields (arXiv)

  • Score : 20252

2604.04635v1 Deterministic Loop Stochastic Series Expansion Algorithm for Quantum Spin Models in Magnetic Fields (arXiv)

  • Score : 19774

2604.06867v1 Proximate quantum spin liquid state in the frustrated HoInCu$_4$ metal (arXiv)

  • Score : 5071

2604.03975v1 Weyl points enabling significant enhancement of thermoelectric performance in an antiferromagnetic van der Waals metal GdTe3 (arXiv)

  • Score : 16047

2604.04346v1 Topological Phase Transitions and Their Thermodynamic Fate in Arbitrary-$S$ Pyrochlore Spin Ice (arXiv)

  • Score : 16334

2604.07130v1 Existence of a Phase Transition in the One-Dimensional Ising Spin Glass Model with Long-Range Interactions on the Nishimori Line (arXiv)

  • Score : 16635

2604.04864v1 Effects of Spin Fluctuation and Disorder on Topological States of Quasi 2D Ferromagnet Fe1/5CrTe2 (arXiv)

  • Score : 17651

2604.03099v1 Proximate quantum spin liquids and Majorana continua in magnetically ordered Kitaev magnets (arXiv)
